description_long: This is a round, low-profile planter with a wide opening, filled with soil and a sparse, dried plant at its center. The exterior of the pot is painted with a whimsical mural featuring vertical, colorful book spines in shades of pink, purple, blue, and orange, along with a stylized pink cat illustration. The upper rim of the pot is white, while the lower portion is a natural terracotta color. The soil inside appears dry and covered with a layer of mulch or wood chips. The pot is solid and robust, likely made of concrete or a similar heavy material, suitable for outdoor urban environments. The playful painted design suggests it may be part of a community art project or urban beautification effort.
description: A round, concrete planter with colorful book and cat mural, filled with dry soil and a sparse, dried plant. The pot features a white rim and terracotta base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the painted cat and book mural, with the dried plant centered in the soil.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting more of the mural, with the cat illustration and additional book spines visible.
description_view_2: Back view focusing on the book mural, with the dried plant slightly off-center and no cat visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the continuation of the book mural, with the white rim and terracotta base prominent.
attribute_plant_species: dried ornamental grass or small shrub
attribute_pot_decoration: painted mural of books and a cat
